title: Deparia wangzhongrenii
taxonomy: Deparia wangzhongrenii is classified within the family Athyriaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the lady ferns. This species of fern is further categorized into the genus Deparia, which is characterized by its unique leaf morphology and distribution. Deparia wangzhongrenii is a species of deciduous fern native to China, and it is often found growing in shaded, moist areas. The species is closely related to other Deparia species, such as Deparia acrostichoides and Deparia cuthbertsonii. Further classification of Deparia wangzhongrenii at the rank of subspecies or variety is not well established.
